name: @absolutejs/agent-discovery
description: Signed, searchable, provider-neutral discovery documents, well-known endpoints, and registries for AI agents.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts src/manifest.ts --outdir dist --target=bun --external @sinclair/typebox && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && absolute-manifest emit
scripts.check:package: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
